text:
The Amami Herb (アマミ草, Amami Kusa)‎‎ is a type of medicinal herb. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Overview

The Amami Herb is one of the four herbs that Ponzu requests for, in her sidequest. 

Item Description

It is called by this name because its large leaves face the heavens.

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

Ponzu asks the Hunter group for four different kinds of herbs and when they manage to retrieve them, she thanks them and joins their group. 

References
